title: ManualReview
description: A human-in-the-loop review of a research object (BeliefCard, DecisionCard, or other). Research-only: a ManualReview produces a research/triage judgement and follow-up tasks; it does not authorize or trigger any financial action. See docs/maker_checker_policy.md and docs/safety_policy.md.

schema_version.description: Version of this schema the record conforms to.

review_id.description: Stable unique id for this review.

object_id.description: Id of the object under review (e.g. a BeliefCard or DecisionCard id).

reason_for_review.description: Why this object was routed to a human (e.g. conflicting evidence, needs_human_review label, near a safety boundary, low confidence).

review_questions.description: Specific questions the reviewer should answer.

reviewer_decision.description: Reviewer's research/triage outcome. Approved labels only; observational, never an action directive. Absent until the review is completed.

reviewer_notes.description: Reviewer's free-text reasoning. No secrets or personal financial account data.

follow_up_tasks.description: Concrete follow-up tasks generated by the review.
